basics.name: Soumya Jeet Sahoo
basics.title: Software Developer
basics.summary: With hands-on experience in full-stack development, REST API integration, and ML model deployment. Passionate about writing clean, efficient code and building scalable software solutions. Eager to contribute to algorithm design, system integration, and continuous improvement as a Software Developer.

bullets: Designed & deployed responsive e-commerce web applications, improving user engagement through optimized UI/UX.
Delivered secure and scalable web apps using HTML5, CSS, JavaScript and GitHub APIs, debugged cross-browser layouts & functionality issues.
Integrated third-party APIs and libraries to extend application features: verified and tested deployments.

projects.title: TripPlanr – Collaborative Travel Planner App
bullets: Developed a real-time collaborative travel app with destination voting, ranking algorithms, and documented architecture for maintainability
Integrated React.js, CSS Modules, Context API, framer Motion for smooth UI animations and navigation flow
Implemented MySQL database to store both default and user-provided datasets.

projects.title: Alzheimer’s Disease MRI Classifier
bullets: Designed and trained a deep-learning model to classify Alzheimer’s stages from MRI scans.
Built, compared, and evaluated ResNet50, VGG19, and InceptionV3 architectures; ResNet50 achieved highest accuracy results documented in model report.

Deployed real-time prediction system using Python, TensorFlow, ResNet50, VGG19, InceptionV3 via Streamlit web app with confidence scores; troubleshot model performance and optimized inference pipeline

projects.title: Virtual Chatbot Assistant
bullets: Built a Python-based desktop chatbot supporting both voice and text interaction with a real-time dynamic interface
Integrated Gemini API, Speech Recognition, Text-to-Speech engines, and live weather info; troubleshot API rate limits and response latency issues.
Optimized search integration, filtering logic, improving response accuracy; documented configuration and setup instructions.

achievements.title: Data Structures & Algorithms Basic to Advanced in Java (16 week course)
Career Essentials in Generative AI by Microsoft
Cybersecurity Job Simulation by JP MorganChase

education.institution: Centurion University of Technology and Management
education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
